summary: Good‑quality recording with standout Bird Song and Promised Land, plus a fantastic second‑set drum segment.
review: The reviewer highlights several gems, calling the Bird Song and Promised Land performances great and noting an especially fantastic drum portion in the second set. No specific recording issues are mentioned, suggesting the sound is at least listenable, while the musical flow receives clear praise.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 4‑star review; positive comments about performance but no concrete recording details, leading to a moderate rating with low confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit remarks on sound quality; overall satisfaction implies the recording is at least decent.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set includes strong performances of Bird Song and Promised Land; second set is highlighted by an especially fantastic drum segment.
